exploration_notes: Complete reachability analysis of do_SOCKS5() in lib/socks.c. The function is REACHABLE from external input. Call chain: curl_easy_perform() -> easy_perform() -> curl_multi_perform() -> multi_runsingle() [MSTATE_CONNECT/MSTATE_CONNECTING] -> Curl_connect() -> Curl_conn_connect() -> cf_setup_connect() [inserts SOCKS filter when conn->bits.socksproxy] -> socks_proxy_cf_connect() -> connect_SOCKS() -> do_SOCKS5(). Critical vulnerability: socks5_resolve_local is a local variable recomputed on each s
